title: CMEMS weather routing for a shipping line
summary: A shipping line integrated CMEMS ocean and wave forecasts into weather routing, cutting fuel use and emissions.
narrative:
## Challenge
Adverse currents and waves increased fuel consumption and emissions on long routes. Existing route planning could not fully exploit favourable conditions or reliably avoid costly weather.

## Approach
CMEMS forecasts of currents, waves, sea level and wind were integrated into the line's weather-routing system, optimising route and speed for each voyage.

## Results
The line achieved measurable per-voyage fuel savings and corresponding emissions reductions, with improved schedule reliability across its main corridors.
